Appearance

14
Distinct attack surfaces surveyed
7
Defense categories evaluated
0
Defenses with deterministic guarantees

We surveyed fourteen attack surfaces, evaluated seven defense categories, and analyzed real-world incidents through March 2026. No single defense covers even half the threats. Every defense has documented bypasses.

Read the Position Paper →

Security research for the AI agent ecosystem

March 2026 — All proof-of-concept examples are conceptual
